MOTIONS TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND/OR CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE WILL BE HEARD ON MARCH 6, 2024 IN DEPTS. 206 AND 302. THESE MOTIONS NEED TO BE RESOLVED BEFORE A RULING ON THE CURRENT MOTIONS. IF THE MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED, THIS MOTION IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO FILING IN THE ARBITRATION. IF THE MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS DENIED BUT THE MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED, THIS MOTION IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 2, 2024 AT 9:00AM IN DEPT 302 (DISCOVERY). THE PARTIES ARE DIRECTED TO MEET AND CONFER AND NARROW THE ISSUES WHICH REQUIRE COURT RESOLUTION. IF THE MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS DENIED AND THE MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE IS DENIED, THE TRIAL JUDGE WILL NEED TO RULE ON THE CURRENT MOTIONS. JUDGE: PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD: W. Hearing is held. Discussed,not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RICHARD CALHOUN, SHON NELSON Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories- General, Form Interrogatories- Employment, Requests Foradmission, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production To Defendant Stachs Llc And Request For Sanctions

Motions to compel arbitration and/or continue the trial date will be heard on March 6, 2024 in Depts. 206 and 302. These motions need to be resolved before a ruling on the current motions. If the motion to compel arbitration is granted, this motion is dismissed without prejudice to filing in the arbitration. If the motion to compel arbitration is denied but the motion to continue the trial date is granted, this motion is continued to April 2, 2024 at 9:00am in Dept 302 (discovery). The parties are directed to meet and confer and narrow the issues which require Court resolution. If the motion to compel arbitration is denied and the motion to continue the trial date is denied, the trial judge will need to rule on the current motions.

Judge: Pro Tem: David McDonald: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
